title: BB-23 heavy blaster cannon

|range=*Up to 75 [[Meter/Legends|m]]<ref name="Range">The ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook]]'' [[Saga Edition|rule system]] establishes that all weapons of a certain type use the same base ranges. As the BB-23 heavy [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] is an inaccurate heavy weapon, according to the ''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'', it has an optimum range from 0 to 50 squares and a maximum range of 250 squares, according to the ''Saga Edition Core Rulebook''. Each square represents a distance of 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]], which gives the weapon an optimum range from 0 to 75 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and a maximum range of 375 meters.</ref> {{C|optimum}}
*375 m {{C|maximum}}<ref name="Range" />

{{Quote|These are my Jokers. Jes Gistang is in charge of the big gun…|[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Ran Harkas]]|<ref name="Noob" />}}
The [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]] '''BB-23 heavy blaster cannon''' was an anti-personnel weapon used by [[heavy weapon specialist]]s in the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. The BB-23 was of considerable size and could unleash a great deal of damage against enemy [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]], gaining it the nickname "'''big gun'''." However, the [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] had to be reloaded after every four shots, requiring the user to carry around a large amount of ammunition. The [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Jes Gistang]] of [[Joker Squad]] used a BB-23 heavy [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannon during the Empire's [[Battle of Borosk (137 ABY)|assault]] on [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] controlled by the rival [[Empire-in-exile]], in [[137 ABY]]. During the second day of fighting, Gistang was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in an explosion that also incinerated her BB-23.

==Description==
{{Quote|Jes Gistang cut swaths with the big gun. It did a lot of damage, but every four shots it needed a new power pack.|Anson Trask|<ref name="Noob" />}}
[[File:BB-23.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Gistang reloading a BB-23 heavy blaster cannon.]]
The BB-23 heavy [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] was an anti-personnel [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]]. The BB-23 was larger than most standard blasters, weighing twenty-two [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]], and could be braced to provide additional support.<ref name="LECG" /> It caused a large amount of damage in a single shot, and wreaked havoc on groups of ground [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] that were spaced too close together; for these reasons, the blaster cannon was given the nickname "big gun."<ref name="Noob" /> It cost 4,200 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and was available for [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] use only.<ref name="LECG" />

However, the BB-23 heavy blaster cannon's main drawbacks were its size and copious use of ammunition. The user was required to wield the blaster cannon with two [[Limb/Legends|hands]] to support its weight, and, because of the weapon's power, it expended a great deal of energy per shot, requiring a new [[Power cell/Legends|power pack]] after every four rounds. Due to this limitation, it was necessary for the user to carry several power packs into battle and to reload the BB-23 constantly, both of which could become a hindrance on the battlefield. The power packs themselves were susceptible to detonation if hit by a [[Laser/Legends|laser]] bolt.<ref name="Noob" /> The heavy blaster cannon had an optimum firing range of up to 75 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and a maximum range of 375 meters.<ref name="Range" />

==History==
{{Quote|There were a couple of problems with the big gun that Gistang used. All those extra power packs are vulnerable to stray blaster bolts.|Anson Trask|<ref name="Noob" />}}
The BB-23 heavy blaster cannon was used by [[heavy weapon specialist]]s in [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] during the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]. [[Jes Gistang]], a heavy weapon specialist and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in [[Joker Squad]]—a unit in the [[407th Stormtrooper Division]] serving Krayt's Empire—utilized a BB-23 during the war. In [[137 ABY]], Joker [[Squad/Legends|Squad]] and the rest of the 407th were dispatched from their [[Imperial base (Yinchorr)|headquarters]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]] to participate in an [[Battle of Borosk (137 ABY)|assault]] on the planet [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]], defended by the [[908th Stormtrooper Division]], which had recently defected to former [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]]'s [[Empire-in-exile]].<ref name="Noob" />

[[File:NoobMeetsGunGirl-SWL04.png|thumb|right|200px|Gistang with her BB-23]]
On the first day of fighting, Joker Squad was among the first forces that attacked the [[908th's Headquarters|908th's headquarters]]. During the battle, Gistang used her BB-23 to great effect, [[Death/Legends|killing]] a number of enemy stormtroopers with her powerful blaster cannon. However, she was forced to continually reload her weapon, and, at one point, her squadmate [[Anson Trask]] had to shoot a 908th stormtrooper who was targeting Gistang while she tried to put a fresh power pack into her blaster cannon.<ref name="Noob" />

During the second phase of the battle, Joker Squad pushed deeper into the 908th's base, eventually reaching a mess hall containing a number of 908th stormtroopers. In the resulting [[lightfight]], a stray blaster bolt hit one of the many power packs that Gistang was carrying on her belt for her BB-23, releasing the energy within. Both she and her weapon were consumed in the resulting explosion.<ref name="Noob" />

==Behind the scenes==
The BB-23 heavy blaster cannon first appeared in the fourth issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series, [[Legacy (2006) 4|''Noob'']], published on [[October 11]], [[2006]]. The BB-23 was only identified by its nickname, the "big gun," in the comic. It was finally given its official designation with the publication of the ''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' on [[March 17]], [[2009]]. In that same year, an action figure of Jes Gistang, along with her BB-23, was released as part of [[Hasbro]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Legacy Collection]]'' Joker Squad six-pack.<ref name="toys">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: The Legacy Collection|pack=Joker Squad|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TLCExJokerSquad.asp}}</ref>

The ''Legacy Era Campaign Guide'' states that the BB-23 heavy blaster cannon held ten shots per power pack. However, this contradicts ''Noob'', which makes it clear that the BB-23 had to be reloaded after every four shots. For consistency, this article assumes the BB-23 held four shots per power pack.
